generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor-mounted position encoder for first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionData
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutputAngleData
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing motor current measurements"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance OutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SINUMERIKController
]

instance MotorPositionDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw motor position measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance OutputAngleDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output angle measurements from gearbox encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current measurements from physical system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from motor current using manufacturer constants"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity calculated from output angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedVsMeasuredTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated vs measured values comparison data for friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardEnabler
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SimulinkFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for friction dynamics (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model for motor behavior in first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AASModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for MABI MAX 100 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for structural representation of first axis components"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulating friction and motor dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical to virtual"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for standardized asset representation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tool for physical relationship understanding"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through model refinement for robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization for physical relationship understanding in first axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction identification insights used to enhance robot motion accuracy"
]

instance MotionAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Enhanced motion accuracy achieved through friction model refinement"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization providing physical relationship understanding for first axis"
]

instance FirstAxisSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot system"
    base:contains MotorComponent, GearwheelGearboxComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent
]

instance MotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Motor component of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance GearwheelGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel gearbox component of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component of MABI MAX 100 first axis"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No virtual-to-physical interaction, as the digital shadow is defined as a passive entity with strictly one-way data flow from physical to virtual, per Kritzinger et al. [32]."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing and synchronization, as indicated by 'real-time, data-driven representations of robot joint behavior' in the abstract."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components, sensor data via MQTT, SysML and Simulink models, AAS, and unified dashboard visualization for friction analysis and motion control enhancement."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, covering continuous updates during robot operation due to wear, tool changes, and application variations, as referenced in 'over the operating time of the robot, since there can be changes due to wear, different tools, or applications'."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validation through deviation analysis of simulated vs measured data, traceability of data generation via Processing components, and multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML standards used for modeling and data structure."
]
